---
title: "Alexander Kirchner-Häusler"
subtitle: Program-Specific Assistant Professor at the Institute for the Future of Human Society (IFOHS) at Kyoto University. <br><br> Affiliated researcher at the University of Sussex and KU Leuven. 
image: images/Picture1.png
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: IFOHS
      text: IFOHS
      href: https://ifohs.kyoto-u.ac.jp/en/archives/member/34714
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/alexander-kirchner-h%C3%A4usler-phd-222a54159/      
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://x.com/KirchnerHausler
    - icon: researchgate
      text: ResearchGate
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Alexander-Kirchner-Haeusler?ev=hdr_xprf&_tp=eyJjb250ZXh0Ijp7ImZpcnN0UGFnZSI6ImhvbWUiLCJwYWdlIjoiaG9tZSIsInBvc2l0aW9uIjoiZ2xvYmFsSGVhZGVyIn19
    - icon: orcid
      text: Orcid
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-2406-7635
---

<center>

<h4 class="navigation">

[Research](index.qmd) \| [Publications](publications.qmd) \| [Presentations](presentations.qmd)

</center>

</h4>

::: {.callout-caution collapse="false"}
## Manuscripts Under Review

**Kirchner-Häusler, A.**, Park, J., Joshanloo, M., Takayama, M., Takano, S., Uchida, Y., Case, B., Lomas, T., Padgett, R. N., Johnson, B. R., & VanderWeele, T. J. (2025). The state of well-being in Japan: A multidimensional examination using data from the Global Flourishing Study. International Journal of Wellbeing. Manuscript submitted for publication.

Smith, P., **Kirchner-Häusler, A.**, Grigoryan, L., Lun, V., Lopukhova, O., Perez Floriano, L., Diaz Rivera, P. E., Abbas, A., Papastylianou, A., Tripodi, D., Gunsoy, C., Hakobjanyan, A., Torres, C., Grigoryan, A., Kocak, O., Mendes Texeira, M. L., Selim, H., Milfont, T., Gavreliuc, A., Gavreliuc, D., Bilewicz, M., Kwantes, C., Anderson, J., Easterbrook, M., Koc, Y., Delfino, G., Chobthamkit, P., Ping, H., Efremova, M., Daganzo, M. A., Adams, B., Ogusu, N., Tan, C. S., Guevara Maldonado, M., Lay, S., & Gamsakhurdia, V. (2025). Which cultural dimensions predict variations in emotional conformity? An extension of Vishkin et al. (2023) across 28 nations. (Manuscript under revision). Journal of Cross-Cultural Psychology.

:::

Jin, S., Romano, A.†, Vignoles, V. L.†, **Kirchner-Häusler, A.**, Rodríguez-Bailón, R., Cross, S. E., Yalçın, M.J., Harb, C., Husnu, S., Ishii, K., Karamouna, P., Kafetsios, K., Kateri, E., Matamaros-Lima, J., Miniesy, R., Na, J., Pagliaro, S., Psaltis, C., Rabie, D., Teresi, M., Uchida, Y, & Uskul, A. K.\* (under 2nd round review). Honour, competition and cooperation across 13 societies. \[Manuscript accepted at Nature Human Behavior\]. School of Psychology, University of Sussex.

**Kirchner-Häusler, A.**, Uskul, A.K., Wohl, M. J. A., Vignoles, V.L., Cross, S. E., Rodriguez-Bailón, R., Gezici-Yalçın, M., Harb, C., Husnu, S., Kafetsios, K., Kateri, E., Matamoros-Lima, J. A., Miniesy, R., Na, J., Pagliaro, S., Psaltis, C., Rabie, D., Teresi, M., & Uchida, Y. (2025). The role of apology beliefs for apology tendencies across cultures with varying honor norms. \[Manuscript accepted at Current Research in Ecological and Social Psychology\]. Institute for the Future of Human Society, Kyoto University.

**Kirchner-Häusler, A.**, Uskul, A.K., Wohl, M., Orazani, N., Rodríguez-Bailón, R., Cross, S. E., Gezici-Yalçın, M., Harb, C., Husnu, S., Kafetsios, K., Kateri, E., Matamoros-Lima, J., Miniesy, R., Na, J., Pagliaro, S., Psaltis, C., Rabie, D., Teresi, M., Uchida, Y., & Vignoles, V.L. (2025). Assessing the Role of Honor Culture and Image Concerns in Impeding Apologies \[Manuscript accepted at European Journal of Social Psychology\]. School of Psychology, University of Sussex. [Full article](publications/Euro J Social Psych - 2025 - Kirchner‐Häusler - Assessing the Role of Honour Culture and Image Concerns in Impeding.pdf)

Schouten, A., Boiger, M., **Kirchner-Häusler, A.**, & Mesquita, B. (forthcoming). Culture and emotions in romantic relationships. In De Leersnyder, J. (Ed.), The Socio-Cultural Shaping of Emotion. Cambridge University Press: Cambridge, UK.

Husnu, S., Psaltis, C., **Kirchner-Häusler, A.**, & Uskul, A. K. (2025). Retributive justice beliefs in Cyprus: The role of apology effectiveness and honor value endorsement. \[Manuscript accepted at Current Research in Ecological and Social Psychology\]. Department of Psychology, University of Cyprus. [Preprint](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=5056764)

Kafetsios, K., Hess, U., Alonso-Arbiol, I., Schütz, A., Gruda, D., Campbell, K., Chen, B.-B., Dostal, D., Held, M. J., Hypsova, P., Kamble, S., Kimura, T., **Kirchner-Häusler, A.**, Kyvelea, M., Livi, S., Mandal, E., Ochnik, D., Papageorgakopoulos, N., Seitl, M., … Uskul, A. K. (2025). Higher social class is associated with higher contextualized emotion recognition accuracy across cultures. PLOS ONE, 20(5), e0323552. https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pone.0323552 [Full article](publications/Kafetsios%20et%20al.%20-%202025%20-%20Higher%20social%20class%20is%20associated%20with%20higher%20contextualized%20emotion%20recognition%20accuracy%20across%20cultures.pdf)

Sánchez-Rodríguez, Á., O’Dea, C., Uskul, A. K., **Kirchner-Häusler, A.**, Vignoles, V., Chobthamkit, P., Achmad, R. A., Andrianto, S., Kristanto, A. A., Ardi, R., Lesmana, C. B. J., Castillo, V. A., Chaleeraktrakoon, T., Zhi, A. C. H., Choompunuch, B., Cross, S. E., Nguyen, S. D., Fernandez, E. F., Purba, F. D., … Uchida, Y. (2025). Overcoming low status or maintaining high status? A multinational examination of the association between socioeconomic status and honour. British Journal of Social Psychology, 64, e12854. [Full article](publications/Sánchez‐Rodríguez%20et%20al.%20-%202025%20-%20Overcoming%20low%20status%20or%20maintaining%20high%20status%20A%20multinational%20examination%20of%20the%20association%20between%20socioeconomic%20status%20and%20honour.pdf)

Kafetsios, K., Hess, U., Dostal, D., Seitl, M., Hypsova, P., Hareli, S., Alonso-Arbiol, I., Schütz, A., Gruda, D., Campbell, K., Chen, B.-B., Held, M. J., Kamble, S., Kimura, T., **Kirchner-Häusler, A.**, Livi, S., Mandal, E., Ochnik, D., Sakman, E., … Uskul, A. K. (2025). A contextualized emotion perception assessment relates to personal and social well-being. Journal of Research in Personality, 114, 104556. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jrp.2024.104556 [Full article](publications/Kafetsios et al. - 2025 - A contextualized emotion perception assessment relates to personal and social well-being 4.pdf)

Vignoles, V. L.\*, **Kirchner-Häusler, A.**\*, Uskul, A. K.\*, Cross, S. E., Na, J., Uchida, Y., Rodriguez-Bailón, R., Bossom, I.R.L., Castillo, V. A., Gezici Yalçın, M., Harb, C., Husnu, S., Ishii, K., Jin, S., Karamaouna, P., Kafetsios, K., Kateri, E., Matamoros-Lima, J., Miniesy, R., ... Wohl, J.A. (2024). Are Mediterranean Societies 'Cultures of Honor'? Prevalence and Implications of a Cultural Logic of Honor Across Three World Regions \[Manuscript accepted at Personality and Social Psychology Bulletin\]. School of Psychology, University of Sussex. *\* Shared first authorship* [Full article](publications/vignoles-et-al-2024-are-mediterranean-societies-cultures-of-honor-prevalence-and-implications-of-a-cultural-logic-of.pdf)

Uskul, A. K., Hanel, P., **Kirchner-Häusler, A.**, Jin, S., Vignoles, V. L., Castillo, V. A., Cross, S. E., Yalçın, M.J., Harb, C., Husnu, S., Ishii, K., Jin, S., Karamouna, P., Kafetsios, K., Kateri, E., Matamaros-Lima, J., Liu, D., Miniesy, R., Na, J., Özkan, Z., Pagliaro, S., Psaltis, C., Rabie, D., Rodríguez-Bailón, R., Teresi, M., & Uchida, Y. (2024). Differences and Similarities in Psychological Characteristics between Cultural Groups Circum Mediterranean. \[Manuscript accepted at Journal for Personality and Social Psychology\]. [Accepted Manuscript](publications/Uskul%20-%202024%20-%20Differences%20and%20Similarities%20in%20Psychological%20Characteristics%20between%20Cultural%20Groups%20Circum%20Mediterranean.pdf)

Uskul, A.K., Cila, J., Gul, P., **Kirchner-Häusler, A.**, & Hubena, B. (2024). Honor, Acculturation and Well-being: Evidence from the UK and Canada. British Journal of Social Psychology, 63, 1701-1724. [Full article](publications/Uskul%20et%20al.%20-%202024%20-%20Honour,%20acculturation%20and%20well‐being%20Evidence%20from%20the%20UK%20and%20Canada.pdf)

**Kirchner-Häusler, A.**, Schönbrodt, F. D., Uskul, A. K., Vignoles, V. L., Rodríguez-Bailón, R., Castillo, V. A., Cross, S. E., Gezici-Yalçın, M., Harb, C., Husnu, S., Ishii, K., Karamaouna, P., Kafetsios, K., Kateri, E., Matamoros-Lima, J., Miniesy, R., Na, J., Özkan, Z., Pagliaro, S., Psaltis, C., Rabie, D., Teresi, M., & Uchida, Y. (2024). Proximal and distal honor fit and subjective well-being in the Mediterranean region. Journal of Personality, 92(1), 38-54. [Full article](publications/Kirchner‐Häusler%20et%20al.%20-%202024%20-%20Proximal%20and%20distal%20honor%20fit%20and%20subjective%20well‐being%20in%20the%20Mediterranean%20region.pdf)

Scharbert, J., Humberg, S., Kroencke, L., Reiter, T., Sakel, S., Ter Horst, J., ... **Kirchner-Häusler, A.**, ... & Back, M. D. (2024). Psychological well-being in Europe after the outbreak of war in Ukraine. Nature Communications, 15(1), 1202. [Full article](publications/Scharbert%20et%20al.%20-%202024%20-%20Psychological%20well-being%20in%20Europe%20after%20the%20outbreak%20of%20war%20in%20Ukraine.pdf)

**Kirchner-Häusler, A.**, De Leersnyder, J., Uskul, A. K., Mirzada, F., Vignoles, V. L., Rodríguez-Bailón, R., Castillo, V.A., Cross, S.E., Gezici Yalçın, M., Harb, C., Husnu, S., Ishii, K., Karamaouna, P., Kafetsios, K., Kateri, E., Matamoros-Lima, J., Miniesy, R., Na, J., Özkan, Z., Pagliaro, S., Psaltis, C., Rabie, D., Teresi, M., & Uchida, Y. (2023). Cultural fit of emotions and subjective well-being: Replicating comparative evidence and extending it to the Mediterranean region. Current Research in Ecological and Social Psychology, 5, 100171. [Full article](publications/Kirchner-Häusler%20et%20al.%20-%202023%20-%20Cultural%20fit%20of%20emotions%20and%20subjective%20well-being%20Replicating%20comparative%20evidence%20and%20extending%20it%20to%20the%20Mediterranean%20region.pdf)

Scharbert, J., Reiter, T., Sakel, S., ter Horst, J., Geukes, K., Gosling, S. D., Harari, G., Kroencke, L., Matz, S., Schoedel, R., Shani, M., Stachl, C., Talaifar, S., Aguilar, N. M. A., Amante, D., Aquino, S. D., Bastias, F., Biesanz, J. C., Bornamanesh, A., **Kirchner-Häusler, A.**, ... & Back, M. D. (2023). A global experience-sampling method study of well-being during times of crisis: The CoCo project. Social and Personality Psychology Compass, 17(10), e12813. [Full article](publications/Scharbert%20et%20al.%20-%202023%20-%20A%20global%20experience‐sampling%20method%20study%20of%20well‐being%20during%20times%20of%20crisis%20The%20CoCo%20project.pdf)

Uskul, A. K., **Kirchner-Häusler, A.**, Vignoles, V. L., Rodríguez-Bailón, R., Castillo, V. A., Cross, S. E., Gezici Yalçın, M., Harb, C., Husnu, S., Ishii, K., Jin, S., Karamouna, P., Kafetsios, K., Kateri, E., Matamaros-Lima, J., Liu, D., Miniesy, R., Na, J., Özkan, Z., Pagliaro, S., Psaltis, C., Rabie, D., Teresi, M., & Uchida, Y. (2023). Neither Eastern nor Western: Patterns of independence and interdependence in Mediterranean societies. Journal of Personality and Social Psychology, 125(3), 471-495. [Full article](publications/Uskul%20-%202023%20-%20Neither%20Eastern%20nor%20Western%20Patterns%20of%20Independence%20and.pdf)

Psaltis, C., **Kirchner-Häusler, A.**, Uskul, A.K., Kovras, I., & Eleftheriou, A. (2023). The Role of Honor, Dignity, and Face Values in Transitional Justice Preferences in Post-Conflict Cyprus. Peace and Conflict: Journal of Peace Psychology, 29(3), 294-305. [Full article](publications/Psaltis%20et%20al.%20-%202023%20-%20Role%20of%20honor,%20dignity,%20and%20face%20values%20in%20transitional%20justice%20in%20postconflict%20cyprus.pdf)

**Kirchner-Häusler, A.**, & Mesquita, B. (2022). *How do happy couples feel? It depends on the culture*. Invited contribution to the Character & Context blog of the Society for Personality and Social Psychology. [Full article](https://spsp.org/news/character-and-context-blog/kirchner-hausler-mesquita-culture-couples-satisfaction)

**Kirchner-Häusler, A.**, Boiger, M., Uchida, Y., Higuchi, Y., Uchida, A., & Mesquita, B. (2022). Relatively Happy: The Role of the Positive-to-Negative Affect Ratio in Japanese and Belgian Couples. Journal of Cross-Cultural Psychology, 53(1), 66-86. [Full article](publications/Kirchner-Häusler%20et%20al.%20-%202022%20-%20Relatively%20Happy%20The%20Role%20of%20the%20Positive-to-Negative%20Affect%20Ratio%20in%20Japanese%20and%20Belgian%20Couples.pdf)

Boiger, M., **Kirchner-Häusler, A.**, Schouten, A., Uchida, Y., & Mesquita, B. (2022). Different bumps in the road: The emotional dynamics of couple disagreements in Belgium and Japan. Emotion, 22(5), 805–819. [Full article](https://lirias.kuleuven.be/retrieve/596308)

Schouten, A., Boiger, M., **Kirchner-Häusler, A.**, Uchida, Y., & Mesquita, B. (2020). Cultural Differences in Emotion Suppression in Belgian and Japanese Couples: A Social Functional Model. Frontiers in Psychology, 11:1048, 1 – 12. [Full article](https://www.frontiersin.org/journals/psychology/articles/10.3389/fpsyg.2020.01048/full)

**Kirchner, A.**, Boiger, M., Uchida, Y., Norasakkunkit, V., Verduyn, P., & Mesquita, B. (2018). Humiliated fury is not universal: the co-occurrence of anger and shame in the United States and Japan. Cognition and Emotion, 32(6), 1317-1328. [Full article](https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/abs/10.1080/02699931.2017.1414686)

Braun, S., Bark, A. H., **Kirchner, A.**, Stegmann, S., & van Dick, R. (2015). Emails From the Boss—Curse or Blessing? Relations Between Communication Channels, Leader Evaluation, and Employees’ Attitudes. International Journal of Business Communication, 56(1), 50-81. [Full article](https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/abs/10.1177/2329488415597516)
